description: classify-current-session.ts:70-73 implements isEmpty via raw cast 'note.body as unknown as string' and then 'raw.trim().length === 0'. The domain type contract (docs/domain/code/ts/src/shared/value-objects.ts:60) defines BodyApi.isEmptyAfterTrim(body: Body): boolean as the canonical API for this check. The current implementation bypasses the DMMF smart-constructor contract and hard-codes trim logic. If BodyApi.isEmptyAfterTrim semantics ever diverge (e.g., Unicode-aware whitespace), this inline implementation will silently differ. The spec says 'per NoteOps.isEmpty' (behavioral-spec.md:77), not an ad-hoc inline check.
